channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: After bye week, Bears hope to maintain momentum for upcoming key games
item.description: Given a week off after their offense got rolling against Jacksonville in London, Caleb Williams and the Chicago Bears might have been better served without a Week 7 bye.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Tests confirm a season-ending knee injury for 49ers receiver Brandon Aiyuk
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — San Francisco 49ers star receiver Brandon Aiyuk will miss the rest of the season after tearing ligaments in his right knee.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: WNBA champion, Bay Area native shattered records in latest series
item.description: (KRON) – The New York Liberty officially won a WNBA Championship after defeating the Minnesota Lynx in a nail-biting Game 5 (67-62). Liberty point guard and Miramonte High School alum Sabrina Ionescu won her first chip with multiple accolades.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Texas fined $250K for trash thrown onto field, must ID and ban fans
item.description: The SEC said it won't suspend alcohol sales at Texas events, but "reserves the right to do so if other requirements are not met.
item.dc:creator: Billy Gates, NewsNation

item.title: FINAL | Bucs 31, Ravens 41
item.description: In the early 2000s, the Tampa Bay Buccaneers and the Baltimore Ravens were synonymous with great defense in the NFL, but now they are playing a different brand of football.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: New York Liberty win first WNBA championship, beating Minnesota 67-62 in OT
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — As confetti fell and Frank Sinatra’s “New York, New York” blared through the arena, the New York Liberty celebrated the end of a long odyssey.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Dodgers finish off Mets with 10-5 win in NLCS and advance to face Yankees in World Series
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani carried the injury-riddled Los Angeles Dodgers to baseball's best record during the regular season. Tommy Edman joined the team in late July and helped them reach the World Series. It's been that kind of year for the big-spending Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Patrick Mahomes and Chiefs stay undefeated, beat 49ers 28-18 in Super Bowl rematch
item.description: The formula might look a bit different with the defense and running game carrying the Kansas City Chiefs. But the results are awfully familiar as the two-time defending champions keep knocking off teams — especially the San Francisco 49ers.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ricky Pearsall gives 49ers a lift with his return. But they lose Brandon Aiyuk to a knee injury
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — The San Francisco 49ers got a lift from rookie receiver Ricky Pearsall making his NFL debut exactly 50 days after being shot in the chest but might have lost starting receiver Brandon Aiyuk to a significant knee injury.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Utes offensive struggles continue in 13-7 loss to TCU
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utes football team hit a new low Saturday night, with an extremely disappointing 13-7 loss to TCU at Rice-Eccles Stadium. The offense managed just one touchdown, while freshman quarterback Isaac Wilson was sacked four times.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Olympian to drug lord: Snowboarder accused of running drug ring
item.description: Wedding competed for Canada in the 2002 Winter Olympics in Salt Lake City; according to the official Olympics website, he finished 24th in the parallel giant slalom event.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, NewsNation

item.title: Christian Barmore apologizes to Rhode Island police after racism remarks
item.description: Patriots defensive tackle Christian Barmore issued an apology on social media to the Providence Police Department after he accused officers of racism during a recent traffic stop.
item.dc:creator: Raymond Baccari, NewsNation

item.title: Yankees get to Guardians closer Clase again, score 2 runs in 9th to win 8-6 and take 3-1 ALCS lead
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Cleveland All-Star closer Emmanuel Clase gave up two runs in the ninth inning and the New York Yankees moved closer to another World Series, beating the Guardians 8-6 on Friday night to take a 3-1 lead in the American League Championship Series.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: University of South Florida to support hurricane relief efforts during UAB football game
item.description: Fans who donate three or more shelf-stable items will receive a coupon for two complimentary tickets to a 2024 home football game of their choice.
item.dc:creator: Merissa Lynn, USF, WFLA, NBC

item.title: These Dick's Sporting Goods stores will sell championship gear after closing hours if the Dodgers win on Friday
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers can punch their tickets to the World Series on Friday night, and Southern California fans itching to get their hands on some championship merchandise can do so quickly.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Former Bears quarterback Jay Cutler arrested for DUI, gun charge
item.description: FRANKLIN, Tenn. — Former Bears quarterback Jay Cutler was arrested Thursday in Tennessee for allegedly driving intoxicated. Officers responded to the 200 block of Bridge Street at around 5 p.m. in Franklin, Tennessee on the report of a minor traffic collision involving two vehicles.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, ABC 4

item.title: Former NFL player's Best Defense Foundation helps veterans at home
item.description: A former NFL linebacker, Donnie Edwards, created the Best Defense Foundation in 2018 to honor and celebrate war veterans.
item.dc:creator: Marielena Balouris, ABC 4

item.title: Criticism sparked over Snapdragon Stadium field conditions
item.description: The San Diego Wave FC lost 1-0 to Mexico’s Club America Wednesday. Both teams are advancing to the semifinals, but it was the turf that was the talk of the tailgate.
item.dc:creator: Jaime Chambers, Fox 5

item.title: Anaheim knocks off Utah in overtime, 5-4
item.description: ANAHEIM, Calif. (AP) - After winning two overtime games to begin its first road trip, the Utah Hockey Club closed out the trip with an overtime loss.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Lonzo Ball makes long-awaited return from knee injuries, scores 10 in Bulls' preseason game
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — When the moment finally arrived, after multiple knee surgeries and one grueling rehab, Lonzo Ball raised his right arm and blew a kiss to the cheering United Center crowd. Fans rose to their feet as the announcement echoed through the arena: “Checking in for the Chicago Bulls! No.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Illinois teen deemed ineligible for cross-country race after charity 5K
item.description: “I don’t really think there’s any reason that running a charity 5K should get me disqualified for running cross-country meets,” freshman Cole Deering said.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Bernthal, NewsNation

item.title: Blackhawks fall in Calgary to end season-opening road trip, host Sharks in home opener Thursday
item.description: CALGARY, Alberta (AP) — The Blackhawks will finally play on their home ice after a four-game Western Conference road trip to open the 2024-25 season. It was a trip with mixed results.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9
